zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot於1276年10月18日出生時，他的父親Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal27歲，母親Sarah de Beauchamp27歲。他於1300年與Anne Boteler在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年2月24日在英國賀福爾艾可萊斯瓦爾享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot was born on 18 October 1276, his father, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, was 27 and his mother, Sarah de Beauchamp, was 27. He married Anne Boteler in 1300, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 24 February 1346, in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot est né le 18 octobre 1276, son père, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Beauchamp, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anne Boteler en 1300, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 24 février 1346, à Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot am 18. Oktober 1276 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal 27 und seine Mutter Sarah de Beauchamp 27. Er hat 1300 in England Anne Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Februar 1346 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England.

Lui sposato Anne Boteler nel 1300, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 24 febbraio 1346, nel Eccleswall, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbotが1276年10月18日に生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswalは27歳，母Sarah de Beauchampは27歳であった。1300年にイギリスでAnne Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年2月24日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエククレスワルで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot(이)가 1276년 10월 18일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Beauchamp(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1300년 영국에서 Anne Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 2월 24일 영국 허퍼드실르 치레스월에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot nasceu em 18 de outubro de 1276, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Beauchamp, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Boteler em 1300, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1346, em Eccleswall, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot родился 18 октября 1276 г., его отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Beauchamp, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Boteler в 1300 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 24 февраля 1346 г. в местности экклесвалл, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
